description_long: This bird has a streamlined body with a smooth transition from a pale, almost white head and underparts to darker grayish-brown wings and tail. The beak is slender, slightly curved, and pointed, well-suited for probing or picking. The plumage is clean and unmarked, with a subtle gradient from the lighter breast to the darker dorsal side. The tail is long and appears straight with a slight taper, and the wings are folded neatly along the body. The legs are not visible in these views, but the overall form suggests a medium-sized passerine bird. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of natural bird feathers.
description: A medium-sized bird with a pale head and underparts, dark gray-brown wings and tail, and a slender, slightly curved beak. The plumage is smooth and unmarked, with a subtle gradient from light to dark.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the pale head and underparts, with the darker wings and tail clearly visible.
description_view_1: Oblique view highlighting the smooth gradient from the pale breast to the dark back and tail, and the slender beak.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the long, straight tail and the gentle curve of the beak, with the body profile visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the bird and the clean transition between the light and dark plumage.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with gradient transition from pale underparts to darker wings and tail
